item.title: Have some voice actors
item.description:
Technically not voice-acting, but it's too cool not to share. The voicechanger is a Sonovox.
It's almost as if voice actors have layers. Like an onion.
richardwells48 on tiktok, not sure if he's on instagram Surprisingly, quite a few people seem confused about what this is. PEGI is a rating system for games. Think of the movies like "PG-13" or "Rated R for adults". Y'know, the thing nobody cares about except sue-happy parents. Apparantly it's a Europe thing, when I thought it was an American thing. In hindsight, it's in the abbreviation, but honestly who even looks those up. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/PEGI
https://www.instagram.com/danieljferguson/
https://www.instagram.com/rob_paulsen/
Mel Blanc, Lucille Ball, Jerry Colonna and ??
Mel Blanc, Lucille Ball, Jerry Colonna and ??
item.dc:creator: cosonfused

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
it's called self care
do not disturb them
Glenn Close? more like Glenn Far
who doesn't?
accurate
that looks like a flan?
sad state of affairs
nope
nailed it
i am close and the image seems really familiar. tell me your thoughts imgur
clicking won't work unfortunately
what the frig did corbo do?
mmm hmm
when you're high as giraffe titties
damnit chris
every day is a great day for deicide
that's all for this one.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.dc:creator: Shenaniganz80

item.title: The French sure aren’t subtle
item.description:
During the Olympics opening ceremonies: A French metal band hanging off the side of a building playing over a bunch of flamethrowers. Metal. The band is Gojira and they’re awesome. https://streamable.com/4qdjv2
But it gets better! The song they played was about the French people imprisoning and beheading the French leaders during the French Revolution..from the building the French leaders were imprisoned in..played in front of a bunch current French and other world leaders!
Complete with just the right amount of symbolism.
item.dc:creator: IWantToSeeMountainsAgain

item.title: It's my 42nd today, grab a towel, don't panic and enjoy the dump.
item.description:
Most viral! Yay! Be kind, rewind.
Yesterday would've been his 16th birthday. But sadly he crossed the rainbow bridge last november.

item.dc:creator: TheElliotPage

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1085 (creamy bouncy morning)
item.description:
Good morning. Or afternoon. Or hopefully, one time period in which is good for you at this moment, or one that comes soon. Let's get this bread.
I dreamed last night that for some reason, I rescued a Ruby-crowned Kinglet on vacation somewhere in this weird hostel, and it wouldn't stay put inside my shirt.
Yes. Yes we do.
Sometimes, this is me waking up briefly at 3am after going to bed early.
Feed your oppressors to the Land.
Also, arguably, Ancient-Classical Rome (Romulus to Romulus Augustulus), and the Eastern Roman Empire (Constantine I to Constantine VI)
I can't remember now what this flag was, making this meme less funny now, damn it.
Pippin would tell them I was a good boy.
Yeah. Don't do this.
@SecretHarpy
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [Silence while preening himself]
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: I’m sure Celine Dion was great
item.description: Never have. Never really will. Sport is nice, but keep it friendly. We’re still all human. Edit: I think the IOC is as guilty as FIFA. Humanity for everyone.
item.dc:creator: GuaiLoh

item.title: Oh man I’m not looking forward to the reactions
item.description: The story is about a man who returns to his childhood home after 20 years to care for his estranged father who’s dying of advanced Alzheimer’s. As the disease whittles away at the man his father once was, long buried memories begin to resurface, revealing a dark, disturbing truth. The epilogue is a fkn doozy and a half. I tie together the 12 stories in the anthology through the story of a deranged witch who seeks to provide her satanic master with a human vessel by building a homunculus using tokens from each of the different stories. I can tell already my über religious mother is just gonna love it /s. Ughhh it’s already available to preorder kindle/ebook versions before the paperbacks go on sale and I’m freaking out. *Edit: Omg I expected this post to die in obscurity lol when I saw the notifications this morning, I literally started to sweat through my pjs lmao thank you everyone for the kind words! A few people have asked for the link to the book so I’ll post it here so you don’t have to search through comments lol kindle and ebook formats are available to preorder now at: mybook.to/lilypondlane and paperbacks will be available (same link) starting September 1st!
item.dc:creator: friendswithfire

item.title: Happy Belated Cake Day To Me
item.description: Missed my cake day yesterday Saucy: https://x.com/NoContextHumans/status/1816767043519021248?t=5gVgzoBbEpLijG-1JvLmzw&s=19 Yeah, yeah. I know everyone hates Twitter. But if you can block out the sheer volume of extreme hate on that site, you can find nuggets of good stuff left here and there (I refuse to call it anything else beside Twitter) Edit: Someone in the comments gave the link to the original: https://www.instagram.com/p/C9wk3vUIQvs/?igsh=aDRtN2x6cnZrYm03 Thank you @EccentricNut

item.title: Tribute to Francis - RIP sweet angel
item.description: Francis died suddenly from liver failure. My heart is absolutely broken. Francis’s posts always brought a smile to my face.

item.title: Working on the stairs with ankle weights.
item.description: I'm trying hard not to lean too far forward and keep my hips from twisting. It is very difficult for me sometimes. I will keep working towards my goal. I enjoy working on everything.
item.dc:creator: kaosnole95

item.title: Lmfao!! But If you don't like someone slagging country music don't watch! I love country music, but this is brilliant!!
item.description: Full disclosure, I actually shared this video months ago too, but I needed a laugh tonight and so I watched it again... I share things that I think others might like, especially if it can help others just feel good or give a giggle, so in case anyone else just needs a break from shit and wants a distraction...here it is! Video in one go: https://youtu.be/y7im5LT09a0?si=Y7UI_JcKmVYNxADj
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2
